title: agrostis capillaris var. aristata
intro: Agrostis capillaris var. aristata, also known as hair grass or silver hair grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Agrostis capillaris var. aristata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
